title: Student can register/login with role and reach dashboard
description: Verifies a user can enter a name, select the student role, authenticate, and land on the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Student One into the name field
Select the student role
Submit the authentication form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Host a live session and advance questions while seeing leaderboard updates
description: Verifies a teacher can host a live session from an existing quiz, advance through questions, and observe leaderboard updates after each question.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the live session page
Select an existing quiz to host
Start the live session
Verify a join code is displayed for students to use
Advance to the next question
Advance again after the question completes
Verify the live leaderboard updates after question progression

title: Join a live session by code and answer synced questions with leaderboard updates
description: Verifies a student can join an in-progress live session using a join code, receive questions in sync, submit an answer, and see leaderboard updates.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the live session page
Fill a valid join code into the join code field
Join the live session
Wait for a question to appear
Select an answer option
Submit the answer
Verify the leaderboard is displayed and reflects an update after the question resolves

title: Create and save a quiz with at least one question and see it listed on dashboard
description: Verifies an educator can create a quiz with settings and a question, save it successfully, and then find the new quiz listed on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the quiz builder
Start creating a new quiz
Fill a unique quiz title into the title field
Add a question and select a valid question type and time limit
Save the quiz
Click the navigation option to open the dashboard
Verify the newly created quiz is listed in the available or recent quizzes list

title: First-time onboarding to avatar setup then dashboard reflects saved avatar
description: Verifies a newly authenticated user can customize and save an avatar and then see it reflected on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Student Avatar into the name field
Select the student role
Submit the authentication form
Click the option to set up or edit the avatar
Adjust at least one avatar attribute
Save the avatar
Click the link to go to the dashboard
Verify an avatar is displayed on the dashboard

title: Dashboard shows core progression stats
description: Verifies that an authenticated student can view XP, level, and streak metrics on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Student Stats into the name field
Select the student role
Submit the authentication form
Verify progression stats are displayed on the dashboard

title: Student can open a recent attempt and see its details
description: Verifies that a student can drill into a recent quiz attempt from the dashboard and view score and timestamp details.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Student Attempts into the name field
Select the student role
Submit the authentication form
Scroll to the recent attempts section
Open the first available recent attempt
Verify attempt details include a score and a timestamp

title: Edit a draft quiz by adding an additional question before saving
description: Verifies an educator can add multiple questions to a quiz and save the updated quiz successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the quiz builder
Start creating a new quiz
Fill a unique quiz title into the title field
Add a first question and select a valid question type
Add a second question and select a valid question type and time limit
Save the quiz
Verify the quiz is saved successfully and the quiz content area shows the added questions

title: Authentication requires both name and role
description: Verifies submitting authentication with only a name shows a validation error and does not proceed to the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Student Missing Role into the name field
Submit the authentication form
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the authentication page

title: Avatar changes persist after refresh and remain visible on dashboard
description: Verifies that after saving an avatar, reloading the dashboard still shows an avatar present for the user.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Student Persist Avatar into the name field
Select the student role
Submit the authentication form
Click the option to set up or edit the avatar
Adjust at least one avatar attribute
Save the avatar
Click the link to go to the dashboard
Reload the page
Verify an avatar is displayed on the dashboard

title: Prevent saving a quiz without a title
description: Verifies the quiz builder blocks saving when the title is missing and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the quiz builder
Start creating a new quiz
Ensure the quiz title field is empty
Attempt to save the quiz
Verify a title validation error is visible and the quiz is not saved

title: Block joining a live session with an invalid join code
description: Verifies the join flow prevents entry when the join code is invalid and shows a user-facing error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the live session page
Fill an invalid join code into the join code field
Attempt to join the live session
Verify an invalid code error is visible and the user is not placed into an active session view

title: Dashboard shows an empty state when no recent attempts exist
description: Verifies that when a student has no recent attempts available, the dashboard shows an empty state for recent activity.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Student No Attempts into the name field
Select the student role
Submit the authentication form
Scroll to the recent attempts section
Verify an empty state is visible for recent attempts

title: Cancel quiz creation by leaving without saving and confirm it does not appear on dashboard
description: Verifies that leaving the quiz builder without saving does not create a new quiz entry on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the quiz builder
Start creating a new quiz
Fill a unique quiz title into the title field
Add a question and select a valid question type
Click the navigation option to open the dashboard without saving
Verify the unsaved quiz does not appear in the available or recent quizzes list
